race.description: Pinjarra Cup Day - Peel Bus Hire Available Mdn
race.comment: VIVALDA (10) won a trial coming into her fresh run but was just outclassed in Saturday grade. The form out of that has stood up however and this is a much easier assignment here. Drawn better for Fiore and with that run under her belt, she can land the knockout blow. SHILLING LANE (3) was very close in his debut campaign, though that was nearly 2 years ago now. He'll be fitter for two trials coming in, looking impressive in his latest outing where he scored. Pike sticks with him and it'd be some training performance off a 701-day break. MAYTHISBETHEONE (9) has enough speed to roll forward from the wide draw and gets the pacifiers on today. May be able to dictate proceedings up front and she'll take catching. KING BREW (4) will find this tougher, but he was solid on debut and he's worth including. CHORISTER (7) can fire a shot on resumption.
